name: sprint-flow
description: Iterative sprint development workflow for Codex and Claude Code. Split PRDs into sprints, execute each sprint with clean-context handoffs, and generate completion reports.

interface.shortDescription: Split PRDs into executable sprints with handoffs and reports
interface.longDescription: Use Sprint Flow to initialize a sprint plan from a PRD, run sprints sequentially, review progress, and complete sprint handoffs using shared .sprint workflow artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Sprint Flow from my PRD.
Show my current Sprint Flow status.
Run the next Sprint Flow sprint.
